use_cases: Creates an interactive image trail that follows the cursor for engaging visual effects on landing pages
Adds animated image sequences behind the mouse pointer for marketing and portfolio websites
Provides a playful cursor interaction for product showcases and galleries
Enhances user engagement with dynamic cursor-following visuals on creative agency sites
Delivers ambient motion effects that respond to user mouse/touch movement
ai_summary: An interactive cursor trail component that displays a sequence of images following the mouse or touch position, creating a visually engaging trail effect. Supports configurable trail length, animation distance, and optional fade transitions. The component manages its own z-index cycling to ensure proper layering of trailing images and responds to both desktop mouse and mobile touch events.
